  app\product_hunter\service.py:79:    def _estimate_competition(product: SupplierProduct, demand_score: float) -> float:
> app\product_hunter\service.py:80:        # MVP proxy: high stock and broad categories imply more competition; higher supplier rating offsets risk.
  app\product_hunter\service.py:81:        stock_pressure = min(product.stock_available / 500, 1.0) * 0.25
  app\product_hunter\service.py:82:        category_pressure = 0.20 if product.category.lower() in {"home", "beauty", "electronics_accessories"} else 0.12
  app\product_hunter\service.py:83:        demand_pressure = demand_score * 0.25
  app\product_hunter\service.py:84:        quality_offset = (product.supplier_rating / 5) * 0.10
  app\product_hunter\service.py:85:        return round(max(0.05, min(0.85, 0.22 + stock_pressure + category_pressure + demand_pressure - quality_offset)), 3)

> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:21:        delivery_risk = min(estimated_delivery_days / 45, 1.0)
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:22:        stock_risk = 1.0 if stock_available <= 0 else min(20 / stock_available, 1.0)
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:23:        demand_risk = 1 - demand_score
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:24:        margin_risk = 1.0 if margin_percent < 0 else max(0.0, min(1.0, (30 - margin_percent) / 30))
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:25:        roi_risk = 1.0 if roi_percent < 0 else max(0.0, min(1.0, (50 - roi_percent) / 50))
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:26:        signals = [
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:27:            RiskSignal(name="supplier", score=supplier_risk_score, weight=0.22, explanation="Supplier reliability/compliance risk"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:28:            RiskSignal(name="returns", score=return_risk_score, weight=0.16, explanation="Expected return/refund exposure"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:29:            RiskSignal(name="delivery", score=delivery_risk, weight=0.13, explanation="Long delivery increases disputes and refunds"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:30:            RiskSignal(name="stock", score=stock_risk, weight=0.09, explanation="Low stock can break fulfillment"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:31:            RiskSignal(name="demand", score=demand_risk, weight=0.14, explanation="Weak demand reduces sell-through"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:32:            RiskSignal(name="competition", score=competition_score, weight=0.10, explanation="High competition pressures margin"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:33:            RiskSignal(name="margin", score=margin_risk, weight=0.10, explanation="Thin margin creates loss risk"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:34:            RiskSignal(name="roi", score=roi_risk, weight=0.06, explanation="Low ROI ties up cash inefficiently"),
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:35:        ]
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:36:        weighted = sum(signal.score * signal.weight for signal in signals)
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:37:        weight_total = sum(signal.weight for signal in signals)
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:38:        total_score = round(max(0.0, min(weighted / weight_total, 1.0)), 4)
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:39:        blocking: list[str] = []
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:41:        if stock_available <= 0:
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:42:            blocking.append("No supplier stock available")
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:43:        if supplier_risk_score >= 0.70:
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:44:            blocking.append("Supplier risk is critically high")
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:45:        if margin_percent < 0:
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:46:            blocking.append("Expected net profit is negative")
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:47:        if estimated_delivery_days > 60:
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:48:            blocking.append("Delivery estimate exceeds 60 days")
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:49:        if 0.45 <= total_score < 0.65:
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:50:            watch.append("Combined risk requires monitoring")
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:51:        if return_risk_score >= 0.35:
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:52:            watch.append("Return risk is elevated")
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:53:        level = "low" if total_score < 0.35 else "medium" if total_score < 0.65 else "high"
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:54:        if blocking:
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:55:            level = "high"

> app\services\risk_engine.py:10:        stock_risk = 1.0 if offer.stock_available == 0 else min(10 / offer.stock_available, 1.0) * 0.4

  app\services\risk_engine.py:12:        combined = (
> app\services\risk_engine.py:13:            offer.supplier_risk_score * 0.35

> app\services\risk_engine.py:15:            + delivery_risk * 0.15

  app\adaptation\engine.py:30:
  app\adaptation\engine.py:31:        refund_rate = self._rate(events, {OutcomeType.REFUND, OutcomeType.RETURN})

> app\adaptation\engine.py:53:        revenue = event.sale_price if event.outcome == OutcomeType.SALE else 0.0

  app\adaptation\engine.py:59:            return 0.0
> app\adaptation\engine.py:60:        return (self._event_profit(event) / event.sale_price) * 100

  app\adaptation\engine.py:63:        if not events:
  app\adaptation\engine.py:64:            return 0.0
  app\adaptation\engine.py:65:        return sum(1 for event in events if event.outcome in outcomes) / len(events)
  app\adaptation\engine.py:66:

  app\adaptation\engine.py:75:            refund_rate = self._rate(group, {OutcomeType.REFUND, OutcomeType.RETURN})

> app\adaptation\engine.py:78:            margin_values = [max(min(self._margin_percent(e), 80), -80) for e in group if e.sale_price > 0]
> app\adaptation\engine.py:79:            margin_component = ((mean(margin_values) if margin_values else 0) + 80) / 160
  app\adaptation\engine.py:80:            reliability_component = 1 - min((refund_rate * 1.5) + (complaint_rate * 2.0) + late_rate, 1)
> app\adaptation\engine.py:81:            score = (margin_component * 0.45) + (reliability_component * 0.55)
  app\adaptation\engine.py:82:            notes = []
  app\adaptation\engine.py:83:            if refund_rate > 0.12:
  app\adaptation\engine.py:84:                notes.append("high refund/return rate")
  app\adaptation\engine.py:85:            if complaint_rate > 0.05:
  app\adaptation\engine.py:86:                notes.append("customer complaints detected")
  app\adaptation\engine.py:89:            if not notes:
  app\adaptation\engine.py:90:                notes.append("within current operating limits")
> app\adaptation\engine.py:91:            results.append(EntityScore(entity_id=entity_id, score=round(max(0, min(score, 1)), 4), sample_size=len(group), notes=notes))

> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:8:    supplier_trust_score: float,

  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:11:):
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:12:    platform_fee = expected_sale_price * platform_fee_percent / 100
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:13:    refund_risk = expected_sale_price * estimated_return_rate_percent / 100 * 0.35
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:14:    net_profit = expected_sale_price - supplier_cost - shipping_cost - platform_fee - refund_risk
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:15:    margin_percent = (net_profit / expected_sale_price) * 100 if expected_sale_price else 0
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:16:
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:17:    opportunity_score = (
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:18:        demand_score * 0.35
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:19:        + (100 - competition_score) * 0.20
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:20:        + supplier_trust_score * 0.20
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:21:        + max(0, min(100, margin_percent * 2)) * 0.25
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:22:    )
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:23:
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:24:    risk_score = (
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:25:        competition_score * 0.25
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:26:        + (100 - supplier_trust_score) * 0.35
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:27:        + estimated_return_rate_percent * 0.25
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:28:        + max(0, 25 - margin_percent) * 0.15
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:29:    )
  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:30:
> app\final_mvp\scoring.py:31:    if net_profit <= 0 or margin_percent < 15 or risk_score > 55:

  app\final_mvp\scoring.py:35:    else:

> app\product_hunter\service.py:79:    def _estimate_competition(product: SupplierProduct, demand_score: float) -> float:
  app\product_hunter\service.py:80:        # MVP proxy: high stock and broad categories imply more competition; higher supplier rating offsets risk.
> app\product_hunter\service.py:81:        stock_pressure = min(product.stock_available / 500, 1.0) * 0.25
> app\product_hunter\service.py:82:        category_pressure = 0.20 if product.category.lower() in {"home", "beauty", "electronics_accessories"} else 0.12
> app\product_hunter\service.py:83:        demand_pressure = demand_score * 0.25
> app\product_hunter\service.py:84:        quality_offset = (product.supplier_rating / 5) * 0.10
  app\product_hunter\service.py:85:        return round(max(0.05, min(0.85, 0.22 + stock_pressure + category_pressure + demand_pressure - quality_offset)), 3)
  app\product_hunter\service.py:86:
  app\product_hunter\service.py:87:    @staticmethod
> app\product_hunter\service.py:88:    def _recommended_sale_price(product: SupplierProduct, demand_score: float, competition_score: float) -> float:
> app\product_hunter\service.py:89:        landed_cost = product.unit_cost.amount + product.shipping_cost.amount
> app\product_hunter\service.py:90:        markup = 1.75 + (demand_score * 0.55) - (competition_score * 0.35)
  app\product_hunter\service.py:91:        minimum_markup = 1.45
> app\product_hunter\service.py:92:        sale_price = max(landed_cost * max(markup, minimum_markup), landed_cost + 8.0)
> app\product_hunter\service.py:93:        return round(sale_price, 2)

  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:22:        stock_risk = 1.0 if stock_available <= 0 else min(20 / stock_available, 1.0)
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:23:        demand_risk = 1 - demand_score
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:24:        margin_risk = 1.0 if margin_percent < 0 else max(0.0, min(1.0, (30 - margin_percent) / 30))
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:25:        roi_risk = 1.0 if roi_percent < 0 else max(0.0, min(1.0, (50 - roi_percent) / 50))
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:26:        signals = [
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:27:            RiskSignal(name="supplier", score=supplier_risk_score, weight=0.22, explanation="Supplier reliability/compliance risk"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:28:            RiskSignal(name="returns", score=return_risk_score, weight=0.16, explanation="Expected return/refund exposure"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:29:            RiskSignal(name="delivery", score=delivery_risk, weight=0.13, explanation="Long delivery increases disputes and refunds"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:30:            RiskSignal(name="stock", score=stock_risk, weight=0.09, explanation="Low stock can break fulfillment"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:31:            RiskSignal(name="demand", score=demand_risk, weight=0.14, explanation="Weak demand reduces sell-through"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:32:            RiskSignal(name="competition", score=competition_score, weight=0.10, explanation="High competition pressures margin"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:33:            RiskSignal(name="margin", score=margin_risk, weight=0.10, explanation="Thin margin creates loss risk"),
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:34:            RiskSignal(name="roi", score=roi_risk, weight=0.06, explanation="Low ROI ties up cash inefficiently"),
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:35:        ]
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:36:        weighted = sum(signal.score * signal.weight for signal in signals)
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:37:        weight_total = sum(signal.weight for signal in signals)
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:38:        total_score = round(max(0.0, min(weighted / weight_total, 1.0)), 4)
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:39:        blocking: list[str] = []
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:40:        watch: list[str] = []
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:41:        if stock_available <= 0:
  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:42:            blocking.append("No supplier stock available")
> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:43:        if supplier_risk_score >= 0.70:

> app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:45:        if margin_percent < 0:

  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:50:            watch.append("Combined risk requires monitoring")

  app\risk\advanced_risk_engine.py:54:        if blocking:

> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:28:    expected_refund_cost = item.expected_sale_price * (item.estimated_return_rate_percent / 100) * 0.35
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:29:    net_profit = item.expected_sale_price - item.supplier_cost - item.shipping_cost - platform_fee - expected_refund_cost
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:30:    margin_percent = (net_profit / item.expected_sale_price) * 100 if item.expected_sale_price else 0
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:31:
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:32:    demand_component = item.demand_score * 0.35
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:33:    competition_component = (100 - item.competition_score) * 0.20
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:34:    supplier_component = item.supplier_trust_score * 0.20
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:35:    margin_component = max(0, min(100, margin_percent * 2)) * 0.25
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:36:
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:37:    opportunity_score = demand_component + competition_component + supplier_component + margin_component
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:38:
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:39:    risk_score = (
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:40:        item.competition_score * 0.25
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:41:        + (100 - item.supplier_trust_score) * 0.35
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:42:        + item.estimated_return_rate_percent * 0.25
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:43:        + max(0, 25 - margin_percent) * 0.15
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:44:    )
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:45:
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:46:    if net_profit <= 0 or margin_percent < 15 or risk_score > 55:
  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:47:        decision: Decision = "reject"
> app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:48:    elif opportunity_score >= 65 and margin_percent >= 25 and risk_score <= 40:

  app\upgrade\ai_scoring.py:50:    else:
